# Dependencies: Form 1040 Line 22 — Tax After Nonrefundable Credits (2025)

> Re-authored 2026-06-14. Source of truth: `lines/22.md`.

---

## Formula

```
Form1040.line22 = max(0, Form1040.line18 - Form1040.line21)
```

Implementation convention:

```
Form1040.line22 = max(0, nz(Form1040.line18) - nz(Form1040.line21))
```

Storage convention: **ALWAYS-SET** — `tac.setTaxAfterCredits(line22)` is called unconditionally. The PDF cell shows the literal "0" when credits absorb tax (never blank).

Reference implementation (`TaxReturnComputeService.java:26963-26966`):

```java
BigDecimal line18 = safeAmount(tac.getTotalTaxBeforeCredits());
BigDecimal line22 = roundMoney(line18.subtract(line21).max(BigDecimal.ZERO));
tac.setTaxAfterCredits(line22);
```

The `.max(BigDecimal.ZERO)` clamp is the structural enforcement of the IRS "If zero or less, enter -0-" instruction.

---

## Inputs to Line 22

| Input | Source method | Java getter | Storage convention |
|---|---|---|---|
| Line 18 — tax before credits | `computeLine18()` | `TaxAndCredits.getTotalTaxBeforeCredits()` | always-set (computed from line 16 + line 17) |
| Line 21 — total nonrefundable credits | `computeLine20ThroughLine24()` (computed in same method) | `TaxAndCredits.getTotalCredits()` | null-when-zero (local `line21` variable used here is the pre-storage `BigDecimal`) |

### Indirect inputs feeding line 21

| Input | Source method | Java field |
|---|---|---|
| Line 19 — CTC / ODC | `computeSchedule8812()` | `TaxAndCredits.childTaxCredit` |
| Line 20 — Schedule 3 line 8 | `finalizeSchedule3Totals()` | `Schedule3.nonrefundableCredits.totalNonrefundableCredits` |

---

## Storage Convention — ALWAYS-SET (unique among neighbors)

Three null-handling conventions coexist in the single method `computeLine20ThroughLine24`:

| Line | Field | Setter call |
|---|---|---|
| 20 | `otherCreditsSchedule3` | null when totalCredits == 0 |
| 21 | `totalCredits` | `(line21 > 0) ? line21 : null` (null-when-zero) |
| **22** | **`taxAfterCredits`** | **unconditional set (ALWAYS-SET)** |
| 24 | `totalTax` | `(line24 > 0) ? line24 : BigDecimal.ZERO` (zero-when-zero) |

Rationale: the IRS instruction explicitly says **"enter -0-"** when the subtraction is zero or negative. A blank PDF cell would violate that instruction; the literal "0" is mandatory.

---

## Outputs

| Output | Java field | Setter | Downstream consumer |
|---|---|---|---|
| Line 22 — tax after credits | `TaxAndCredits.taxAfterCredits` | `setTaxAfterCredits(BigDecimal)` (unconditional) | Line 24 (same method) + Form 2210 Part I line 1 + PDF field |

---

## Downstream Consumers of `taxAfterCredits`

| Consumer | How used | Location |
|---|---|---|
| `computeLine20ThroughLine24()` itself | `line24 = line22 + safeAmount(line23)` | same method, next 3 lines |
| `computeForm2210()` | Part I line 1 = `safeAmount(getTaxAfterCredits())` — **G3 fix 2026-04-19** | `TaxReturnComputeService.java:27562-27565` (lock-in test `form2210Line1UsesTaxAfterCreditsNotTotalTaxBeforeCredits` at `TaxReturnComputeServiceTest.java:22631`) |
| Frontend `form-tax-return-1040.component.ts` | PDF fill `line22_tax_less_credits` | line 327 |

---

## PDF Field Mapping

| Form 1040 line | PDF semantic key | AcroForm field | Page |
|---|---|---|---|
| 18 | `line18_add_lines16_and_17` | `f2_10[0]` | 2 |
| 21 | `line21_total_credits_add_lines19_20` | `f2_13[0]` | 2 |
| **22** | **`line22_tax_less_credits`** | **`f2_14[0]`** | **2** |
| 23 | `line23_other_taxes` | `f2_15[0]` | 2 |
| 24 | `line24_total_tax` | `f2_16[0]` | 2 |

Frontend fill (`form-tax-return-1040.component.ts` line 327):

```typescript
values['line22_tax_less_credits'] = this.formatAmount(form.taxAndCredits?.taxAfterCredits);
```

Because line 22 is ALWAYS-SET, `formatAmount` always renders a number (never empty string) — even when credits absorb all tax, the PDF cell shows "0".

---

## Compute Order

```
... (lines 1-15) ...
computeLine16()                      → tax / Form 8814 / Form 4972 / §962 etc.
computeLine17() + buildForm8959()    → AMT (Schedule 2 line 2)
computeLine18()                      → sets tac.totalTaxBeforeCredits = line16 + line17
computeSchedule8812()                → sets tac.childTaxCredit (line 19)
applyXxxToSchedule3() [all forms]    → populates Schedule 3 credit fields
finalizeSchedule3Totals()            → sets Schedule3 line 8
finalizeSchedule2OtherTaxes()        → sets tac.otherTaxes (line 23) — runs BEFORE computeLine20ThroughLine24
computeLine20ThroughLine24() {
    line20 = Schedule3.line8
    line21 = nz(line19) + nz(line20)               (null-when-zero)
    line22 = max(0, nz(line18) - nz(line21))      ← THIS LINE (always-set)
    line24 = line22 + nz(line23)                   (zero-when-zero)
}
computeLine31ThroughLine38()         → reads tac.getTotalTax() (line 24); does NOT read line 22 directly
computeForm2210()                    → reads tac.getTaxAfterCredits() (line 22) as Part I line 1 — G3 fix
```

Call site: `TaxReturnComputeService.java:26963`.

---

## Guardrails (from lines/22.md §7)

| Rule | Enforced? | Mechanism |
|---|---|---|
| `line22 >= 0` — zero floor (IRS "If zero or less, enter -0-") | YES — structural | `.max(BigDecimal.ZERO)` at `TaxReturnComputeService.java:26965` |
| `line22 <= line18` | implicit | guaranteed by the floor at zero |
| Floor belongs on line 22 (not line 21) | YES — design | line 21 is raw sum; floor enforced one step later |
| `line22` is ALWAYS-SET (never null) | YES | unconditional `setTaxAfterCredits` |
| Line 22 excludes line 23 other taxes | YES | line 23 added at line 24 only |
| Line 22 excludes refundable credits | YES | refundable credits enter at lines 27a-31 (after line 24) |
| Line 22 excludes withholding / estimated payments | YES | payments enter at lines 25-26 (after line 24) |
| Line 12a / 12b / 12c / 12d margin-note boxes are **NO-OP for line 22** | YES | code has no special branching for line 12 box flags; margin note refers to upstream deduction worksheets, not line 22 arithmetic |

---

## Unit Test Coverage

`TaxReturnComputeServiceTest.java`:

| Test | Assertion on line 22 |
|---|---|
| smoke (~line 12821) | `assertNotNull(getTaxAfterCredits())` |
| `line21_line22FlooredAtZeroWhenCreditsAbsorbAllTax` | `taxAfterCredits == 0` when CTC == tax |
| `line21_equalsLine19PlusLine20_ctcAndAotc` | `taxAfterCredits` non-null, arithmetic correct |
| `line21_isNullWhenNoCreditsPresent` | `taxAfterCredits == line18` when no credits |
| `form2210Line1UsesTaxAfterCreditsNotTotalTaxBeforeCredits` (line 22631) | Form 2210 Part I line 1 reads line 22, not line 18 (G3 lock-in) |

---

## E2E Test Coverage

`e2e/tests/line22-tax-after-credits.spec.ts` (config: `timeout: 180000, retries: 1`):

| Test | Scenario |
|---|---|
| "Line 22 — equals line 18 when no credits are present" | `line21 == 0`, `line22 == line18` |
| "Line 22 — equals line 18 minus line 21 when credits partially offset tax" | `line22 == line18 - line21 > 0` |
| "Line 22 — is zero when credits fully absorb tax (floor at zero)" | `line22 == 0` (verifies PDF cell shows "0", not blank) |

---

## Known Gaps

None outstanding. Historical gaps (G1 missing retries directive, G2 documented-already-fixed drift) were closed 2026-04-19 and the doc-drift was resolved 2026-05-15 via 22 #4.
